# Approval Matrix

| Deviation | Default approver | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Liability cap removed or exceeds approved threshold | CLCO | Also check insurance, price, and client strategic value. |
| Indemnity uncapped or covers first-party losses/fines/client-controlled risks | CLCO | Prefer third-party claims and causal link to Vendor breach/control. |
| IP assignment before payment or assignment of Background IP/know-how | CLCO | May also require Delivery/Product review. |
| GenAI ban or strict AI warranties | CLCO + Delivery + Security | Assess impact on engineering tools and delivery model. |
| Payment term >30 days, set-off, withholding without gross-up, pay-when-paid | Finance + CLCO if material | Consider prepayment or milestone billing. |
| Security audit, penetration testing, or access to Vendor systems | Security + CLCO | Use security addendum and limit scope/frequency/confidentiality. |
| Processing of personal data, sensitive data, or PHI | Privacy counsel / DPO + Security | Use DPA or BAA; confirm data flow. |
| Governing law/forum outside approved jurisdictions | CLCO | Assess enforceability, language, cost, injunctions, and collections. |
| Termination for convenience shorter than 60 days or no payment/ramp-down protection | Finance + Delivery + CLCO | Protect committed utilization and work performed. |
| Broad non-compete, exclusivity, or hiring restriction | CLCO + Sales | Distinguish client protection from market restriction. |
